action.reasoning: Observation: The baseline with 10k timesteps and a flattened MLP policy achieved 0.0 success rate, which is expected due to the very short training time and suboptimal architecture. Analysis: Minigrid environments benefit from CNNs to process the 7x7 grid effectively. Also, 10k timesteps is far too few. Decision: I will implement a custom CNN feature extractor for SB3, use SubprocVecEnv with 16 workers to speed up training, and increase the training timesteps to 500,000 per environment. I will also increase the entropy coefficient to 0.05 to encourage exploration.
